channel.title: Your Name on Ahmed Boureghida
channel.description: Recent content in Your Name on Ahmed Boureghida

item.title: TryHackMe Room: Pickle Rick Writeup
item.description: tryhackme room : Pickle Rick A Rick and Morty CTF. Help turn Rick back into a human! difficulty: easy link: Pickle Rick Room 1- sudo nmap -sS -sV -A -sC –script=vuln -T5 10.10.225.125 get 2 open ports OpenSSH 7.2p2 Ubuntu 4ubuntu2.6 check the ssh vulnerability that nmap finds in the scan report and I get: … i try many exploits but nothing can be exploited Apache httpd 2.4.18 ((Ubuntu)) same I try many exploits but nothing can be exploited 2- gobuster dir -u http://10.
